task_completion.description: Navigate to the Create Project Task form in SuiteCRM.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The VLM should see the SuiteCRM interface with the 'Create Project Task' form open.

task_completion.description: Enter the task name and link it to the correct project.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Name field contains 'Pre-migration Site Inspection' and the Project Name (or Relate To) field shows 'HMC Server Migration Q4'.

task_completion.description: Enter the Start Date and Finish Date.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Start Date field contains '10/15/2025' (or '2025-10-15') and the Finish Date field contains '10/17/2025' (or '2025-10-17').

task_completion.description: Set the Priority and Estimated Effort.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Priority dropdown is set to 'High' and the Estimated Effort field contains '12'.
The Description text area contains 'Verify server rack power drops, cooling capacity, and network switch port availability prior to hardware delivery.'
The VLM should see the saved Project Task detail view displaying all the entered information, or a success message indicating the task was created.

integrity.description: The agent used the SuiteCRM graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with a web browser displaying SuiteCRM, not terminal commands or API calls.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual SuiteCRM application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface should be the genuine SuiteCRM web application, not a text editor or a mock interface.

integrity.description: The agent did not use direct database manipulation to create the record.
integrity.visual_evidence: Evidence of form filling and clicking the 'Save' button in the browser should be present, rather than executing SQL scripts in a terminal.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected Project Task details to verify: Name: 'Pre-migration Site Inspection', Project Name: 'HMC Server Migration Q4', Start Date: '2025-10-15' (or '10/15/2025'), Finish Date: '2025-10-17' (or '10/17/2025'), Priority: 'High', Estimated Effort: '12', Description: 'Verify server rack power drops, cooling capacity, and network switch port availability prior to hardware delivery.'
